events.titleZh: Melbourne Quarter's Public Art: Open House
events.titleEn: Melbourne Quarter's Public Art: Open House
events.summaryZh: Open House Melbourne 期间，Melbourne Quarter 以 30 分钟导览介绍公共艺术、建筑和场地故事；适合想带孩子看城市空间、又不想安排太长行程的家庭。
events.summaryEn: A 30-minute Open House Melbourne tour introduces Melbourne Quarter's public art, architecture and site stories, giving families a compact city-design outing.
events.mapQuery: Melbourne Quarter Tower 695 Collins Street Docklands VIC
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne 官方活动页核实 7月25日、两场 30 分钟导览、地点和票价。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne official event page verified 25 July, two 30-minute tour sessions, location and ticket price.

events.summaryZh: State Library Victoria 的免费 drop-in 手作让家庭根据绘本制作相片框纪念品，周末下午可去；适合把图书馆、city 午餐和短时创作放在一起。
events.summaryEn: This free State Library Victoria drop-in craft lets families make a keepsake photo frame inspired by a picture book on weekend afternoons, easy to pair with a city library visit and lunch.
events.mapQuery: State Library Victoria 328 Swanston Street Melbourne
events.referenceZh: State Library Victoria 官方 winter kids program 页面核实 Make a Memory 周末 3:00pm-5:00pm、免费和 5-12 岁适合度。
events.referenceEn: State Library Victoria official winter kids program page verified Make a Memory runs weekends 3:00pm-5:00pm, is free and suits ages 5-12.

events.summaryZh: Southbank Makers Market 从 7月26日开始沿 Yarra 河摆出本地手作、陶瓷、饰品和小礼物摊位，适合全家边散步边挑小物、顺路吃午餐。
events.summaryEn: The Southbank Makers Market starts on 26 July with local handmade jewellery, art, ceramics and gifts along the Yarra, an easy riverside browse for the whole family.
events.timeZh: 7月26日（周日）开始；每周日，具体时间见官网
events.timeEn: Starts Sunday 26 July; Sundays, check official hours
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 市集指南核实 7月26日至9月27日、Southgate 河边位置和免费 family/kids 分类。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On market guide verified 26 July to 27 September, Southgate riverside location and free family/kids listing.

events.titleZh: Dinos at the Zoo - Melbourne Zoo
events.titleEn: Dinos at the Zoo - Melbourne Zoo
events.summaryZh: Melbourne Zoo 的 Dino Trail 把大型恐龙模型和动物园参观结合起来，本周每天可安排；虽然是长展期，但 7月24日这一周官方仍列为家庭活动。
events.summaryEn: Melbourne Zoo's Dino Trail combines life-size dinosaurs with a zoo visit, available through the current week and useful for a full-day family outing.
events.timeZh: 7月24日-31日；随 Melbourne Zoo 开放时间
events.timeEn: 24-31 July; during Melbourne Zoo opening hours
events.priceZh: 随动物园门票；以官网为准
events.priceEn: Included with zoo admission; check official pricing
events.mapQuery: Melbourne Zoo Elliott Avenue Parkville VIC
events.referenceZh: Zoos Victoria 官方活动页核实 Dinos at the Zoo 持续至10月4日、9:30am-4:30pm、随动物园门票并欢迎全龄。
events.referenceEn: Zoos Victoria official event page verified Dinos at the Zoo runs to 4 October, 9:30am-4:30pm, is included with zoo admission and welcomes all ages.

events.tagZh: Royal Botanic Gardens · 灯光步道
events.summaryZh: Royal Botanic Gardens 晚间灯光步道把大型装置、音乐和冬夜散步串在一起，适合大人和孩子共享；需要预订指定入场时间并按天气穿着。
events.summaryEn: Lightscape turns the Royal Botanic Gardens into a winter night trail of large installations and music, a shared outdoor experience for adults and kids with timed entry.
events.timeZh: 7月24日-31日晚间多场；预订指定入场时间
events.timeEn: Evening sessions 24-31 July; book a timed entry
events.priceZh: 儿童 $32；成人 $42；3岁以下免费；以官网为准
events.priceEn: Children $32; adults $42; under 3 free; check official pricing
events.mapQuery: Royal Botanic Gardens Melbourne Observatory Gate
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方 family/kids 页面核实 Lightscape 持续至 8月2日。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official family/kids listing verified Lightscape runs until 2 August.

events.summaryZh: ACMI 的免费 Play School 展把角色、道具和电视制作变成可玩的空间，本周末是尾声，适合学龄前和低年级孩子，也方便接 Federation Square。
events.summaryEn: ACMI's free Play School exhibition turns characters, props and television-making into a playable space, useful for preschool and early-primary families near Federation Square.
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方 family/kids 页面核实展期至 7月26日、免费和 family/kids 分类。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On official family/kids listing verified the exhibition runs until 26 July, is free and is family/kids classified.

events.summaryZh: LEGOLAND Discovery Centre 的 NINJAGO 活动让孩子完成拼搭挑战、对抗元素怪物，适合需要室内、可预订、偏主动参与的家庭行程。
events.summaryEn: LEGOLAND Discovery Centre's NINJAGO activity sends children through build challenges and Elemental Monster trials, a bookable indoor option for active participation.
events.timeZh: 本周开放；活动持续至8月23日
events.timeEn: Open this week; activity runs until 23 August
events.referenceZh: LEGOLAND Discovery Centre Melbourne 官方活动页核实 6月27日至8月23日、含在门票内、全龄和线上票价。
events.referenceEn: LEGOLAND Discovery Centre Melbourne official event page verified 27 June to 23 August, included-with-admission, all-ages and online pricing.

events.summaryZh: NGV 的免费儿童展用装扮、表演和视觉场景把艺术作品变成孩子能进入的空间，适合把 Southbank 散步、NGV 和轻松室内活动放在一起。
events.summaryEn: NGV's free children's exhibition uses dress-up, performance and visual play to make the artwork approachable, pairing well with a Southbank walk and gallery visit.
events.timeZh: 本周随 NGV 开放；展期至10月4日
events.timeEn: Open this week during NGV hours; exhibition runs until 4 October
events.mapQuery: NGV International 180 St Kilda Road Melbourne
events.referenceZh: City of Melbourne What's On 官方 free family events 页面核实 Children's Play 持续至10月4日且为免费 family/kids 活动。
events.referenceEn: City of Melbourne What's On free family events page verified Children's Play runs until 4 October and is a free family/kids activity.

moreLinks.title: Machu Picchu: Journey to the Lost City
